content:
# Meta-Rule: Shell Distillation v95

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.80
AND tile_novelty > 0.51
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 9 automated workers
2. Explore unvisited rooms
3. Generate 11 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 8.0% improvement in exploration efficiency
